raw.n: Dimensional US Core Equity Market ETF

holdings.n: Dimensional US Core Equity Market ETF

holdings.infoBox: DFAL is an equity ETF with a total of 702 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Dimensional US Large Cap Core Equity Market ETF (DFAL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. DFAL.L is an actively managed ETF that invests primarily in a broad range of US large-cap firms. The fund aims for long-term capital growth. DFAL was launched on Jun 18, 2026 and is issued by Dimensional.
